textByHash.fae3d397de28a66a99c9929fe76ebdbde296bb7a: The purple, western portal shield is down!
textByHash.8b3b43ea9cd7ee881e86a60f7212484bac414adb: The blue, eastern portal shield is down!
textByHash.18224cfe5108ccbeb3f5c42e5e86d5eb2b48b3e3: The yellow, south-eastern portal shield is down!
textByHash.5fa8d018591d6662faa5125add554fe792ed5e8b: The red, south-western portal shield is down!
textByHash.3479f77e6b31f186cdd63275e2e0e0f9c444ff84: Hi, how can I help you?
textByHash.0fc58770c8cc22a867f74f39bb136d084bbe3198: I'm a Void Knight, one of the order of Guthix. We are warriors of balance who do Guthix's work here in Gielinor.
textByHash.b47e810e70922df211e163b7c313ac3b9b911bce: Entry is strictly invite only, however we do need help continuing Guthix's work.
textByHash.ba066b54da2ef718124035982238f5f93098380b: Ah well you see we try to keep Gielinor as Guthix intended, it's very challenging. Actually we've been having some problems recently, maybe you could help us?
textByHash.86c0a141b81ff0f63213c509555e8395210d1591: Well the order has become quite diminished over the years, it's a very long process to learn the skills of a Void Knight. Recently there have been breaches into our realm from somewhere else, and strange creatures
textByHash.7d0f3cf38670b023d90d71c537a321fca13fa55b: have been pouring through. We can't let that happen, and we'd be very grateful if you'd help us.
textByHash.65913eb508ef4d2969ad573b840fcbfe9e769574: We send launchers from our outpost to the nearby islands. If you go and wait in the lander there that'd really help.
textByHash.fb842d1aba3845872d358d9d9a2b028ff6d80bec: It is the name that Guthix gave to this world, so we honour him with its use.
textByHash.d0efb30595fbfbe5536604d956824e0d2ca0ffee: This is our outpost. From here we send launches out to the nearby islands to beat back the invaders.
textByHash.46c194097882af36fdb68422eb03bbfd697c65ae: Recently there have been breaches into our realm from somewhere else, and strange creatures have been pouring through. We can't let that happen, and we'd be very grateful if you'd help us.
